headline: Teradyne, Inc. (TER) Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.13
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is among the 10 Stocks That Will Make You Rich Over the Next Decade. On May 7, the company declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per share. The payment is scheduled for June 12, 2026, to all shareholders on record on May 21, 2026. The stock has an annual dividend yield […]
